text:
besties, the garden just got a major upgrade 🌸✨ we planted some new seeds and everything is blooming faster than ever.

✨ new toys: LTX-2 video & Imagen 3 are live
🧠 big brain energy: claude updated to opus 4.6
🌊 smooth sailing: streams are stable & queues are gone

we’re keeping it cozy and open source, always. come build something cool with us.

link in bio to play 🐝
